summary: Tested Admin Console Users Tab Enhancement - Role and Subscription dropdown badges, credit balance view-only, OneSignal config, and Stripe checkout endpoints. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user 6f84fcbb-2fe1-4080-ab16-783a88c1b243 for testing, reverted changes after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Console Users tab has working dropdown badges for role and subscription. Credit balance is view-only (no dropdown). OneSignal and Stripe are configured with real keys.

details: Role badge is clickable and shows dropdown with 15 role options
Dropdown includes: Grom, Surfer, Comp Surfer, Pro, Grom Parent, Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro, School, Coach, Resort, Wave Pool, Shop, Shaper, Destination
Clicking a role option updates the user via PATCH /api/admin/users/{user_id}
Subscription badge is clickable and shows dropdown with 3 options: Free, Basic, Premium
Clicking an option updates the user via PATCH /api/admin/users/{user_id}
Credit balance badge shows green styling ($X.XX format)
No dropdown chevron icon - badge is NOT clickable
Uses static Badge component instead of DropdownBadge
REST API key configured in backend .env

mocked_apis.note: Stripe uses test key (sk_test_...) which is real Stripe test mode, not mocked. OneSignal uses real keys.
